title: Spotify’s launches a Wrapped-style recap of your entire listening history
summary: Spotify is launching a new "Wrapped"-style feature that provides a comprehensive recap of your entire listening history, including the total number of unique songs streamed since joining the platform.
content: Spotify's new feature will show you the number of unique songs that you listened to until now

zh.title: Spotify推出Wrapped风格的完整听歌历史回顾功能
zh.summary: Spotify正在推出一项新的"Wrapped"风格功能，提供您完整听歌历史的综合回顾，包括自加入该平台以来流播的独特歌曲总数。

title: Spotify’s latest ‘Wrapped’ covers your entire music history
summary: Spotify is celebrating its 20th anniversary with a new personalized experience showing users their complete music history, including their first song streamed, most-listened artist, and an all-time top 120 tracks playlist dating back to when they joined the service.
content:
Its like a “Wrapped” but for your entire Spotify listening history. | Image by Spotify / The Verge	

Spotify is celebrating its 20th anniversary by giving listeners a "fully personalized look at their entire music history." Starting today, Spotify mobile app users can access a new Wrapped-like experience that features "never-before-shared data" going back to when they first joined the service.
The "Spotify 20: Your Party of the Year(s)" experience will allow users to look back on their first day on Spotify, the first song they streamed, their most-listened to artist, and the total number of unique songs listened to since creating their account. Spotify is also putting together an All-Time Top Songs Playlist that includes the top 120 tracks …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: Spotify最新的'Wrapped'涵盖您的整个音乐历史
zh.summary: Spotify正在庆祝其成立20周年，推出一项新的个性化体验，向用户展示其完整的音乐历史，包括首次流播的歌曲、最常听的艺术家以及从加入服务时起就能回溯的全部时间排名前120首歌曲播放列表。

title: AI voice startup Vapi hits $500M valuation after winning Amazon Ring over 40 rivals
summary: AI voice startup Vapi has reached a $500 million valuation after being selected by Amazon Ring over 40 competitors, with its enterprise business growing 10-fold since early 2025 as companies adopt AI agents for customer support and sales.
content: Vapi says its enterprise business has grown 10-fold since early 2025 as companies shift customer support and sales calls to AI agents.

zh.title: AI语音初创公司Vapi在击败40多个竞争对手赢得亚马逊Ring后达到5亿美元估值
zh.summary: AI语音初创公司Vapi在被亚马逊Ring从40多个竞争对手中选中后已达到5亿美元估值，随着公司采用AI代理进行客户支持和销售，其企业业务自2025年初以来增长了10倍。

title: Once again, SpaceX has set a new record for the tallest rocket ever built
summary: SpaceX has set a new record for the tallest rocket ever built, marking a key milestone in the development of a new Starship version.
content: SpaceX cleared an important milestone Monday on the road to launching a new version of Starship.

zh.title: SpaceX再次创造最高火箭纪录
zh.summary: SpaceX为新型Starship的开发树立了最高火箭纪录，标志着新Starship版本开发的关键里程碑。

title: How to watch Google’s Android Show: I/O Edition today
summary: Google is hosting the "Android Show: I/O Edition" today to announce major Android ecosystem updates and new Gemini features ahead of its main I/O developer conference next week.
content:
Google I/O is still a week away, but Google's big announcements kick off today with the "Android Show: I/O Edition," where it's expected to announce the major Android ecosystem highlights coming to its annual developer conference.
When the Android Show will happen and where you can watch it
Android Show: I/O Edition will be streaming live on YouTube and the Android website on Tuesday, May 12th at 10AM PT / 1PM ET. Based on last year's Android Show, we can expect the highlights to include a look at the next major Android update along with announcements about Gemini features on Android and potentially teases of some more forward-facing proje …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 如何观看谷歌今天的Android Show: I/O版本
zh.summary: 谷歌今天举办"Android Show: I/O版本"来宣布主要Android生态系统更新和新Gemini功能，为下周的主要I/O开发者大会做准备。

title: eBay rejects GameStop’s $56 billion acquisition bid
summary: eBay has officially rejected GameStop's $56 billion acquisition bid, with the board citing concerns about operational risks, financing credibility, and the long-term viability of a combined entity.
content:
No thank you, we’re good. | Photo by Brandon Bell/Getty Images	

eBay has officially rejected GameStop's offer to buy the online marketplace for $56 billion, citing concerns around "operational risks" and how the acquisition will be financed. In a letter to GameStop CEO Ryan Cohen on Tuesday, eBay's board of directors said it has "concluded that your proposal is neither credible nor attractive."
"We have taken into account such factors as 1) eBay's standalone prospects, 2) the uncertainty regarding your financing proposal, 3) the impact of your proposal on eBay's long-term growth and profitability, 4) the leverage, operational risks, and leadership structure of a combined entity, 5) the resulting implic …

Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: eBay拒绝GameStop的560亿美元收购出价
zh.summary: eBay官方拒绝了GameStop的560亿美元收购出价，董事会表示对运营风险、融资可信度和合并后实体的长期可行性感到担忧。

title: Amazon launches 30-minute delivery across the U.S.
summary: Amazon has launched a 30-minute ultra-fast delivery option across the United States for groceries, household essentials, and other items, expanding its rapid delivery capabilities.
content: Amazon says its new ultra-fast delivery option brings groceries, household essentials, and other items to customers’ doors in 30 minutes.

zh.title: 亚马逊在美国推出30分钟快速配送
zh.summary: 亚马逊在美国推出了30分钟超快速配送选项，涵盖杂货、家居用品和其他商品，进一步扩展其快速配送能力。

title: These new Roombas are smaller and cheaper
summary: iRobot has introduced eight new lidar-based robot vacuums with improved features, significantly smaller sizes, and lower prices—some up to $270 cheaper—including enhanced suction power and new "hot spot mopping" capability.
content:
iRobot upgrades its lidar-based robot vacuum line with eight new models. | Image: iRobot	

iRobot has announced a new line of Roombas, a year after it debuted its first lidar-based robot vacuums. This week, it introduced eight robot vacuums that improve on its current lineup and feature lower prices, some up to £200 (about $270) cheaper. Key changes include higher suction power, a smaller overall size to better navigate your home, more models with roller mops, and the introduction of "hot spot mopping." 
iRobot filed for bankruptcy late last year, underwent a reboot, and is now owned by Shenzhen Picea Robotics, a Chinese original design manufacturer of robotic vacuums. The company says its new lineup is up to 25 percent smaller f …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 这些新款Roomba扫地机器人体积更小、价格更便宜
zh.summary: iRobot推出了八款新型激光雷达扫地机器人，具有改进的功能、明显更小的体积和更低的价格——某些型号便宜多达270美元——并配备增强的吸力和新的"热点拖地"功能。

title: Sony upgraded its wearable AC so it’s cooler and better at hugging your neck
summary: Sony released the Reon Pocket Pro Plus, a wearable personal air conditioner with 20% improved cooling performance and redesigned fit for discreet wear under clothing. Launching in Europe at €229, the device continues Sony's personal cooling product line first introduced for the 2020 Tokyo Olympics.
content:
The Reon Pocket Pro Plus delivers a 20 percent improvement in cooling performance over last year’s model. | Image: Sony	

Sony has announced a new version of the wearable personal air conditioner the company first revealed in 2019 ahead of the 2020 Tokyo Olympics. The latest version is an upgrade to last year's Pro model, and while the new Reon Pocket Pro Plus isn't a complete overhaul of the hardware, it comes with performance upgrades and design updates making it easier to wear discreetly under many kinds of shirts. It's launching in Europe and other markets today for €229/£199, or around $270. As with all the previous versions, Sony hasn't mentioned plans to bring it to the US.
Instead of simply blasting you with air like the Dyson HushJet Mini Cool, the Re …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 索尼升级了可穿戴空调，冷却效果更好，贴颈效果更舒适
zh.summary: 索尼发布了Reon Pocket Pro Plus，这是一款可穿戴个人空调设备，冷却性能提高了20%，并重新设计了贴合度以便在衣服下隐蔽佩戴。该设备在欧洲以€229的价格推出，是索尼个人冷却产品线的延续，该产品线最初是为2020年东京奥运会推出的。

title: Thinking Machines wants to build an AI that actually listens while it talks
summary: Thinking Machines is building an AI model that processes user input and generates responses simultaneously, departing from the sequential listen-then-respond pattern used by all current AI models. This approach aims to create more natural, phone-call-like conversations compared to traditional turn-based text exchanges.
content: Right now, every AI model you've ever used works the same way. You talk, it listens. It responds, you listen. Thinking Machines is trying to change that by building a model that processes your input and generates a response at the same time, so it's more like a phone call than a text chain.

zh.title: 思想机器公司想要打造一个边说边听的AI
zh.summary: 思想机器公司正在构建一个能够同时处理用户输入和生成回复的AI模型，这偏离了所有当前AI模型使用的顺序式"听-然后-响应"模式。这种方法旨在创造更自然的、类似电话的对话，与传统的轮流制文本交换相比。

title: Riding an AI rally, Robinhood preps second retail venture IPO
summary: Robinhood is filing confidentially for its second venture fund, targeting both growth-stage and early-stage startups. The filing reflects investor appetite for venture investments amid an AI-driven market rally.
content: Robinhood files confidentially for its second venture fund, this time targeting growth as well as early-stage startups.

zh.title: 乘AI热潮，罗宾汉准备第二只零售风险基金IPO
zh.summary: 罗宾汉正在秘密申报第二只风险基金，目标是成长期和初期初创公司。该申报反映了在AI驱动市场反弹中投资者对创投的热情。
